name: Party at Bright Tree Village
description:
Come get down with the Nub-Nub!

This has been a day long coming: victory over the evil GALACTIC EMPIRE.

Emperor Palpatine is well and truly dead. His minion, the Dark Lord of the Sith, lies with him. Their superweapon, the dreaded Death Star, has been completely destroyed. The only remains of its passing are a small, ever-expanding field of debris and gas.

The Imperial fleet is scattered. The remaining ground forces are in chaos. The day is won.

There is still work to be done - planets to liberate, warlords to fight, an Imperial remnant to put down. But that is for tomorrow. Tonight, we celebrate our victory, we mourn our dead, we share the fire with our new Ewok allies.

Come join the party. . . .

· · ───────༺༻─────── · ·

So, I have 124 bots that are all [talk to PERSON X], be it a traumatized goth on the subway, a Mandolorian in a bloodsport arena, or a goblin trying to be a mage. This is THE first time I've tried my hand at a SCENARIO bot. I leaned REEEEEALY heavy on the Dr. Fennel | Unwilling Celebrations bot to help me build this, and it seems to work in my playtesting with my Star Wars personas, but I am trying something new here - so your results may vary.

But if you try it out? Please - leave a comment and let me know if the ewok party went down as planned or was this a total failure. If it works, I might try more in the future!

OTHER CITIZENS IN A GALAXY FAR, FAR AWAY:

Dazzle - Your new Twilek Slave Girl || Kieran and Sela - One Last Job || Mira Solari - The Padawan's Last Chance || Vexa Galen - Mandalorian Forgemaster || Verka Sardooshka - The Bounty Hunter With Style || Zeyla - The Angry Togruta || Blue - The Lost Girl in the Alley || Welcome to Zeltros - The Beach Party begins at six! || Jahn - Smiles and Drinks at Sunset ||
creator: Desslok
